calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 No Appearance; Order To Arrest

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-29-2022 Continued To Mar-01-23 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for order of examination.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:51:43 p.m. and concluding at 03:14:50 p.m.

Plaintiff/Creditor Waukesha=Pearce Industries, LLC, a Limited Liability Company represented by Lorna Walker, Esq.
Defendant/Debtor Manuel C. Rodriguez, as an Individual, DBA Affinity Resources Co Inc. appearing in pro per.

OFF THE RECORD
Defendant/Debtor MANUEL C. RODRIGUEZ is placed under oath.
Counsel for Plaintiff commence examination.

Parties reach an impasse.
Defendant/Debtor requests a contiuance to obtain counsel.
Plaintiff/Creditr objects.

ON THE RECORD
The Court intervenes.
The case is called. Court reivews the register of actions of the case and notes that Default and Default Judgment were entered against Defendant/Debtor on Oct-19-2019. Judgment was entered for the total sum of $10,809.34.

Defendan/Debtor's request for continuance is argued.

The matter is submitted.
Defendant/Debtor's request for continuance is GRANTED, over the objection of Plaintiff/Creditor. The Court grants it one and only continuance in this matter.
Court orders matter continued to Mar-01-2023 at 2:00 p.m. in Department 505 for further order of examination.
